# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrading SimpleWebApp from net8.0 to net9.0 with minimal hosting model modernization. Single-project solution upgraded all-at-once: TFM bump, Startup.cs → Program.cs minimal hosting migration, and nullable reference types enabled.

**Progress**: 1/2 tasks complete <progress value="50" max="100"></progress> 50%
